full_text:
Gao Yuanlü 高元呂
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gao Yuanlü (高元呂). An expert physiognomist, about 217 he reassured Cao Pi about his prospects as a future ruler. Gao Yuanlü was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
